en_title: Stranger Than Heaven Second-Take Preview: Stranger Than Heaven’s Combat Seems Harder Than Hell, and that’s a Good Thing
cn_title: 《异于天堂》战斗更难却更出彩
subtitle: 硬核街斗
opus_summary: 试玩《异于天堂》后，作者被其革新的双拳控制系统震撼，认为这是《如龙》系列急需的战斗变革。游戏设定于1915至1965年，带来全新玩法，战斗虽难但极具成就感。

paragraphs.en: I’ve been a fan of the Yakuza or Like a Dragon series since the very beginning. As a magazine writer I was lucky enough to visit Sega’s headquarters in Tokyo during the development of the original PlayStation 2 title way back in 2005, and in my years at IGN I’ve reviewed a number of the remakes, sequels, and spin-offs of RGG Studio’s long-running crime series. At this point I’ve invested hundreds of hours into beating the absolute snot out of Japanese mobsters, either via the button-mashing combo-based style of the original adventures or the turn-based RPG form that’s become core to the most recent mainline entries. Thus I feel pretty well-equipped to handle anything that RGG Studio can throw my way at this point, which is why I was so shocked that the new combat system in upcoming series prequel Stranger Than Heaven so completely kicked my arse.
paragraphs.cn: 从系列最初开始，我就是《如龙》（Like a Dragon）系列的忠实粉丝。当年还是杂志撰稿人的我，曾有幸在2005年原版PS2作品的开发期间，前往东京参观世嘉总部；而在IGN工作的这些年里，我也为RGG工作室这个长盛不衰的犯罪系列评测过不少重制版、续作和外传。迄今为止，我已经投入了数百个小时痛揍日本暴徒——要么是通过初代作品那种按键连击的连招制，要么是系列最新几部正传中已成为核心的回合制RPG玩法。正因如此，我认为自己已经做好了充分准备，足以应对RGG工作室扔来的任何挑战。所以，当即将推出的系列前传《异于天堂》中全新战斗系统把我揍得屁滚尿流时，我才会如此震惊。

paragraphs.en: At a recent BiliBili Game First Look event in Shanghai, I got some brief hands-on time with a brawling-based demo for Stranger Than Heaven. (It was the same demo that my colleague Michael Higham recently played, and you can read his excellent preview here .) My first attempts at Stranger Than Heaven’s all-new street fighting style felt harder than hell, but after slowly getting to grips with it over the course of my 30-minute demo I began to feel confident that this is exactly the sort of substantial shift that the Like a Dragon fighting formula has needed for quite a while now.
paragraphs.cn: 近期在上海的B站游戏首发活动上，我短暂试玩了《异于天堂》的一个格斗向试玩版。（也就是我的同事Michael Higham最近玩过的版本，你可以在这里阅读他出色的前瞻。）我初次尝试《异于天堂》全新的街头格斗风格时觉得比地狱还难，但在30分钟试玩中慢慢上手后，我开始确信这正是《如龙》系列格斗机制亟需已久的重大变革。

paragraphs.en: To be clear, I’m not suggesting that RGG Studio needs to scrap the turn-based combat system that it introduced in Yakuza: Like a Dragon and later evolved in Like a Dragon: Infinite Wealth. The novelty of that JRPG-style system is yet to wear off for me, largely because it allows for so many hilarious special moves and a more strategic team-based dynamic in each scrap. I’m talking about the more traditional beat ‘em up system that has effectively been offloaded onto the series’ spin-offs in recent years. RGG Studio may have introduced a briefcase-load of James Bond gadgets in Like a Dragon Gaiden, or cutlasses and flintlocks in Pirate Yakuza, but the actual fighting mechanics of those combo-based systems has remained unaltered for the most part. Even though I still enjoy them, I can’t pretend that they don’t feel a bit too familiar at this point.
paragraphs.cn: 我要事先说明，我并不是在建议RGG Studio彻底放弃《如龙7》引入、并在《如龙8》中进一步进化的回合制战斗系统。那种日式角色扮演风格的战斗对我来说新鲜感还没消退，很大程度上是因为它允许大量令人捧腹的特殊招式，也让每场战斗都更具基于团队合作的策略性。我说的是更传统的清版动作系统——这套系统近年来实际上被转移到了系列衍生作品上。RGG Studio或许在《如龙7外传》里塞了满满一公文包的詹姆斯·邦德式间谍道具，或者在《如龙8外传》里塞了弯刀与燧发枪，但这些连招战斗体系的实际操作手感大体上始终没变。尽管我依然乐在其中，但我也没法假装自己不觉得它们如今已经有点过于似曾相识了。

paragraphs.en: Stranger Than Heaven’s heavily overhauled scrapping, then, feels like the kick in the pants followed by a violent uppercut to the jaw that Like a Dragon’s aging fisticuffs has been crying out for. Forget about chugging in-game energy drinks to pump up your heat gauge and then button-mashing hordes of street thugs into oblivion like in previous Kazama Kiryu-led adventures, because Stranger Than Heaven’s gangs are liable to quickly kick you to the curb if you don’t have your wits about you. The new setup that uses the controller’s four shoulder buttons to effectively puppeteer the left and right fists of protagonist Makoto Daito sure takes some getting used to, both in terms of smoothly alternating his punches but also anticipating the direction of incoming attacks and parrying them effectively, but after finally falling into a rhythm with it after my first few failed attempts it felt incredibly satisfying to pull off. I felt like I had to lock-in for absolutely every exchange in every combat encounter, which meant that my eventual victories felt far more earned than the lazy bicycle-swinging beatdowns of previous Yakuza and Like a Dragon installments.
paragraphs.cn: 《异于天堂》彻底推翻重做的战斗系统，就像是先朝屁股踹一脚，再对着下巴来一记凶狠的上勾拳——这正是《如龙》那套老化的格斗系统一直渴望的变革。忘掉在过往桐生一马领衔的冒险中，那种猛灌游戏内能量饮料来攒满热量槽、再一顿按键狂按把成群的街头混混打成渣的玩法吧——在《异于天堂》里，你要是脑子不够清醒，随时可能被那些帮派揍得找不着北。这套新系统利用手柄的四个肩键，像操纵木偶一样分别控制主角Makoto Daito的左右拳头，确实需要花点时间才能上手——既要流畅地左右开弓，还得预判敌人的攻击方向并精准招架。但在最初几次尝试失败后，我终于摸索出了节奏，那种拳拳到肉的快感真是畅快淋漓。我感觉每一次战斗中的每一次换拳都得打起十二分精神，正因如此，我最终拿下的胜利比过往《如龙》系列里那种懒洋洋抄起自行车乱挥的揍人方式要来得更有分量。

paragraphs.en: Though its learning curve is initially steep, it ultimately feels like the most grounded form of street fighting that RGG Studio has ever designed. In fact, its more rough and tumble realism reminded me of the melee system in 007 First Light, only it felt like I had far more direct control over the moves I was pulling off thanks to the dedicated right and left attack setup. For example, as I wielded a large crowbar in my right hand while tackling a gang of six or so assailants, one of the goons grabbed hold of the end of my weapon and attempted to wrench it out of my grasp. To my surprise, while I was locked in a temporary tug-o-war I still had full control of Makoto’s left hand, which allowed me to throw a few jabs at a second attacker attempting to blindside me. I then grabbed him by the scruff of the neck and knocked his skull into the first thug, taking them both out and allowing me to resume my crowbar-based bullying.
paragraphs.cn: 虽然这套系统的学习曲线一开始相当陡峭，但上手之后，它最终成了如龙工作室设计过的最贴近真实街斗的格斗形态。事实上，它粗野而真实的打斗感让我想起了《007 初露锋芒》中的肉搏系统，只不过在这里，多亏了右手与左手分开攻击的设定，我感觉自己能更直接地操控每一招每一式。举个例子，当时我右手挥着一根大撬棍，正对付六七个围上来的混混，其中一个一把抓住我的武器末端，想硬从我手里夺走。让我意外的是，在短暂陷入拉锯战的那刻，我依然能完全控制诚的左手，于是顺手给了身旁另一个想偷袭我的家伙几拳。接着我揪住他的后颈，把他的脑袋砸向第一个混混，两人同时放倒，我便又可以继续用撬棍欺负人了。

paragraphs.en: Having said that, Stranger Than Heaven’s combat is not without its issues, at least in its current state. I found that the soft lock-on that aligns Makoto with each opponent would occasionally slip, sending me swinging wildly in the wrong direction and leaving me vulnerable to attacks from the rear. Also, while I enjoyed the generally weighty feel to each and every blow I landed, some of the charged up attacks with heavier weapons seemed a touch too sluggish for my tastes. Of course, with Stranger Than Heaven not due for release until early next year, there’s still time for RGG Studio to tighten things up.
paragraphs.cn: 话虽如此，《异于天堂》的战斗并非没有问题，至少就目前版本而言是这样。我发现，用来将Makoto对准每个对手的软锁定偶尔会失效，导致我朝着错误的方向疯狂挥拳，背后门户大开。另外，虽然我很享受每一击结结实实的沉重手感，但部分重型武器的蓄力攻击对我来说似乎有点过于迟缓了。当然，考虑到《异于天堂》要到明年年初才发售，RGG Studio仍有时间来打磨这些问题。

paragraphs.en: Still my overall impression of Stranger Than Heaven’s more challenging brawling system is a positive one, and its dramatic shakeup leaves me feeling optimistic that combat won’t be the only area of the adventure where the developers are taking a big swing. I'm hopeful that this will present the perfect opportunity for RGG Studio to hit the reset button on all aspects of its long established Like a Dragon template, from mission design to the interactive nature of its world and the methods we use to explore it. For example, the audio-recording feature that allows Makoto to record sound samples from the world around him and then convert them into musical compositions certainly sounds cool on paper, and already seems like it could be far more involved than the simple rhythm-based button-tapping of the karaoke mini-game that’s been recycled in every Yakuza and Like a Dragon release since Yakuza 3.
paragraphs.cn: 不过，我对《异于天堂》更具挑战性的格斗系统的整体印象是正面的，其剧烈变革让我感到乐观，觉得战斗不会是开发者大胆尝试的唯一冒险领域。我希望这能为RGG Studio提供一个完美的契机，让他们在《如龙》长久以来建立的模板上按下重置键，涉及从任务设计到世界互动性，再到我们探索世界的方式等方方面面。例如，让Makoto录制周围声音样本并将其转化成音乐作品的音频录制功能，听起来确实很酷，而且这似乎已经比自《如龙3》以来每部《如龙》作品都在循环利用的、基于简单节奏按键的卡拉OK小游戏要复杂得多。

paragraphs.en: I also wonder what other new diversions there could be, given that the story’s 1915 to 1965 setting presumably prohibits the use of the usual modern side activities like Club Sega’s and Master System cartridges found in other Like a Dragon stories. We already know there’ll be arm wrestling mini-games, but could there be old school pachinko parlours as well? And given that the events of Stranger Than Heaven span the course of five decades, will those side activities evolve with each leap forward in time? Not to mention the change in each of the five city settings. You’d think that by the time the story arrives in 1965 Shinjuku, we should be able to try out virtual versions of the electromechanical amusements that Sega famously pioneered during that decade.
paragraphs.cn: 我也好奇还会有哪些新的消遣方式，毕竟故事横跨1915年至1965年的设定，很可能排除了其他《如龙》故事中常见的现代支线活动，比如世嘉俱乐部和世嘉Master System卡带。我们已经知道会有掰手腕小游戏，但会不会也有老式柏青哥店？而且，考虑到《异于天堂》的事件跨度长达五十年，这些支线活动会随着每一次时间跳跃而演变吗？更不用说五个城市背景都会发生变化。你大概会想，等故事来到1965年的新宿时，我们应该能玩到世嘉在那十年间开创的机电娱乐的虚拟版本了吧。

paragraphs.en: I’m desperately keen to learn more, because so far I’ve been pretty excited by everything that RGG Studio has revealed. Well, I mean except for the Tupac thing, of course. Why on earth is Tupac in Stranger Than Heaven? Well, much like the gang of burly thugs I encountered in my hands-on, it beats the heck out of me. Sure, it makes sense that Snoop Dogg is in the game, because Snoop Dogg is in basically everything at this point from televised singing contests to carrying the torch at the last Olympic Games. But having the late great Tupac resurrected in a 2027 videogame for no clear reason just feels a bit off to me. Then again, I’m generally opposed to digital zombies in any modern media, no matter who signs off on it. I can’t watch the CGI’d Peter Cushing reprise his role as Moff Tarkin in Star Wars: Rogue One without sensing a great disturbance in the Force, for example.
paragraphs.cn: 我迫不及待想了解更多，因为迄今为止RGG Studio透露的一切都让我相当兴奋。好吧，当然除了Tupac那件事。Tupac到底为什么会在《异于天堂》里？嗯，就像我在试玩中遇到的那群粗壮暴徒一样，我也完全摸不着头脑。当然，Snoop Dogg出现在游戏里说得通，因为Snoop Dogg现在基本上无处不在，从电视歌唱比赛到上届奥运会传递火炬都有他。但是让已故的伟大Tupac在2027年的电子游戏中毫无明确理由地复活，对我来说总觉得有点不对劲。话又说回来，我普遍反对在任何现代媒体里搞数字僵尸，不管谁许可的。比如，我无法在不感受到原力严重扰动的情况下，看完《星球大战：侠盗一号》里CGI复活的Peter Cushing再次饰演莫夫·塔金。

paragraphs.en: However, that doesn’t prevent me from rewatching Rogue One from time to time, and nor will the somewhat baffling inclusion of Tupac deter me from lunging fists-first into Stranger Than Heaven when it arrives in January 2027. Despite the fact its story takes place in the same fictional Japan as the Like a Dragon saga, Stranger Than Heaven feels as though it's determined to establish its own identity – at least if its fresh-feeling and fiercely challenging fighting system is any indication. Here’s hoping that in all facets, Stranger Than Heaven finds the team at RGG Studio performing stronger than ever, and that this ends up being something much more than just a ye olde Yakuza.
paragraphs.cn: 不过，这并不妨碍我时不时重看《侠盗一号》，而Tupac那有些令人费解的加入也不会阻止我在2027年1月《异于天堂》发售时挥拳上阵。尽管故事发生在与《如龙》系列相同的虚构日本，《异于天堂》给人的感觉是它决心建立自己的独特身份——至少从其新鲜感和极具挑战性的战斗系统来看是这样。希望在所有方面，《异于天堂》都能让RGG Studio团队拿出比以往更强的表现，而最终这绝不仅仅是一个老派的《如龙》。

paragraphs.en: Tristan Ogilvie is a Senior Video Editor at IGN's Sydney office. He attended the recent BiliBili Game First Look event as a guest of the organisers.
paragraphs.cn: Tristan Ogilvie是IGN悉尼办公室的高级视频编辑。他作为主办方嘉宾参加了最近的B站游戏首发活动。

pending_dict.reason: 疑似指《如龙》系列海盗主题外传，无官方中文名
